title: Vežba 16

questions.text: Koja rečenica koristi Anyone who tačno u kontekstu tehnologije?

answers.answer: Anyone who has access to the server can upload the files.
Anyone who please fix this bug.
answers.feedback: Ispravna gramatička upotreba će biti, Anyone who knows the solution, please fix this bug.

answers.answer: Anyone who the programmer is busy now.
answers.feedback: Ova rečenica nije gramatički ispravna. Bolja rečenica će biti, Anyone who is a programmer is busy now.

answers.answer: Who anyone can join the meeting is not clear.
answers.feedback: Ova rečenica je loše strukturirana. Ispravan format će biti, It is not clear who can join the meeting.

description:
Anyone who koristi se za referisanje na bilo koju osobu koja ispunjava određeni uslov ili potrebu.

U tehnologiji, često se koristi za opisivanje ljudi sa posebnim veštinama ili znanjem. Na primer, Anyone who understands JavaScript can modify this script.
